What did you do last week? When did they leave?
Good morning, Izabel. Before we start, could you give us a quick recap of what happened last week?
Of course. Last week we closed the deal with the new supplier, and the first shipment arrived on Monday.
That is great news. Did you resolve the customs problem from the previous order?
Yes, we resolved it on Wednesday. I followed up with the logistics team, and everything matched the invoice.
Perfect. And what about the tax restatement? Did the team finish it?
Not yet. We did not finish it, because the new rules changed halfway through the quarter.
Understood. When did the partners leave after the visit?
They left last Friday. Before they left, we delivered the full cash-flow report by hand.
Last week, we closed the deal with the new supplier.
The shipment arrived on Monday, right on time.
We resolved the customs issue on Wednesday.
We did not finish the tax restatement yet.
Revenue grew by nine percent last quarter.

Hi Izabel, it's Daniel from the supplier side. I'm just leaving you a quick recap before Thursday, so you have everything for the meeting. Last week we shipped the components you ordered, and the shipment arrived on Monday, right on time. We also resolved the customs issue that held up the previous order, so that problem is behind us now. On Wednesday I followed up with your logistics team, and they confirmed that everything matched the invoice. One more thing: we rolled out the new tracking portal last month, so from now on you can check every order yourself. If anything came up on your end, just let me know. Talk soon, and have a good meeting.

Good morning, everyone. This is Sofia from the finance team, with a short recap of last quarter before the call. Overall, it was a strong quarter. Revenue grew by nine percent compared to the same period last year, mostly because we closed two large deals in March. We also hired two engineers and delivered the new product line ahead of schedule. On the cost side, we streamlined the approval workflow, so payments went out faster and we hit every deadline. The one thing we did not finish was the tax restatement, because the new rules changed halfway through the quarter. Izabel will walk you through that part on Thursday. Thank you, and talk soon.
